gigapan.description:
The destruction of building n218, the 14 foot wind tunnel.

The capped off large 'protrusion' in the center of the building was part of the wind tunnel.   See this aeriel image from google maps to see more of what is missing:

http://maps.google.com/maps?f=q&hl=en&geocode=&q=Moffett+Field+NAS,+Mountain+View,+CA&sll=37.0625,-95.677068&sspn=32.197599,79.101563&ie=UTF8&ll=37.415411,-122.061276&spn=0.000984,0.002414&t=h&z=19
